meaning: vt.鍙戝嚭,鏀惧皠,鍚愰湶,鏁ｅ彂,鍙戣〃,鍙戣
examples: The metal container began to emit a clicking sound.
These cars emit more than all the microwaves in the EU.
Soil tilling releases carbon dioxide, and delivery vehicles emit exhaust.
China had voiced its opposition to the scheme, which charges airlines for the carbon they emit.
Natural gas vehicles emit up to 90 percent fewer ozone-depleting gases than gasoline-powered cars.
